creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: decke
Date: Thu Jan 30 15:28:11 2014
New Revision: 341845
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/341845
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r341845/

Log:
  - Update to 2.7.5
  
  PR:		ports/186246
  Submitted by:	Nicolas Jombart <ecu@200ok.org> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/sysutils/sec/Makefile
  head/sysutils/sec/distinfo

Modified: head/sysutils/sec/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/sec/Makefile	Thu Jan 30 14:50:37 2014	(r341844)
+++ head/sysutils/sec/Makefile	Thu Jan 30 15:28:11 2014	(r341845)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	sec
-PORTVERSION=	2.7.4
+PORTVERSION=	2.7.5
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/simple-evcorr/${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION}
 
@@ -26,17 +26,16 @@ PLIST_DIRS+=	%%DATADIR%%
 
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 do-install:
-	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME} ${PREFIX}/bin
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/sec.man ${MANPREFIX}/man/man8/sec.8
-	@${MKDIR} ${DATADIR}
-	cd ${WRKSRC}/contrib && ${INSTALL_DATA} ${PORTCONTRIB} ${DATADIR}
+	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/sec.man ${STAGEDIR}${MANPREFIX}/man/man8/sec.8
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR}
+	cd ${WRKSRC}/contrib && ${INSTALL_DATA} ${PORTCONTRIB} ${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR}
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
-	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${PORTDOCS:S|^|${WRKSRC}/|} ${DOCSDIR}
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${PORTDOCS:S|^|${WRKSRC}/|} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
 .endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/sysutils/sec/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/sec/distinfo	Thu Jan 30 14:50:37 2014	(r341844)
+++ head/sysutils/sec/distinfo	Thu Jan 30 15:28:11 2014	(r341845)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (sec-2.7.4.tar.gz) = 9970285caf14406c74a6899bfb1dc376a5ee3bfc95c6299ee3d44ad4790526f2
-SIZE (sec-2.7.4.tar.gz) = 114289
+SHA256 (sec-2.7.5.tar.gz) = a21dcbb61aa99930f911b79e9412b875af12b08722a78295d210b896f23a0301
+SIZE (sec-2.7.5.tar.gz) = 120333
